title: Zane Tetevano
description: New Zealand and Cook Islands international rugby league footballer
extract:
Zane Tetevano (born 4 November 1990) is a former professional rugby league footballer who played as a prop and represented the Cook Islands, New Zealand, and the New Zealand Māori at international level. 
Tetevano played in the National Rugby League (NRL) for the Newcastle Knights, Sydney Roosters, with whom he won the 2018 NRL Grand Final, and Penrith Panthers. He also played for the Leeds Rhinos in the Super League.
